conflicts.description: The previous continuity sheet says Ben is terminated after chapter 17, but the manuscript explicitly names Gemini's immediate response as a 'material breach' review and only implies role loss afterward.
conflicts.canonical_value: Ben enters Gemini material-breach review in chapter 17; no continuing proxy work is evident by chapter 18.
conflicts.resolution_note: Use the explicit manuscript wording plus the later end-state, rather than overstate a same-scene termination the text does not name.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet limits Leela's physical absence from the apartment to chapter 17, but the manuscript moves her to Mina's after chapter 14 and keeps her away through the showcase.
conflicts.canonical_value: Leela is out of the apartment and with Mina from late chapter 15 through chapter 17.
conflicts.resolution_note: The manuscript repeats the Mina refuge across multiple chapters, so the sheet now reflects the longer absence window.

conflicts.description: The previous sheet treats Leela's dual-zone badge as simply no longer used after the move. The manuscript shows route use ends, but Leela keeps the old badge because it may still open the science lab.
conflicts.canonical_value: The badge is retired from route priority after the move, but retained by Leela as a personal object and possible science-lab access card.
conflicts.resolution_note: Keep the manuscript's distinction between route deactivation and continued physical possession.
